text: Da'wah in principle is an effort by someone to explain the teachings of Islam to believers and non-believers, individuals or groups. This study wants to know how the da'wah method is explained in tafsir Ma'alim Al-Tanzil by explaining QS An-nahl 125-128. It is also hoped that this study can find out how the concept of the da'wah method in QS An-nahl 125-128. This study is a literature study. The data source is primary and secondary data from the Qur'an and the book of tafsir Ma'alimu An-Tanzil by Imam Al-Baghawy, as well as previous data collected and reported by people outside the researcher and obtained from libraries, journals, articles and books related to the problem studied. The data will then be analyzed using the Tahlily method. The conclusion of the analytical study of the da'wah method in QS An-nahl 125-128 in tafsir Ma'alim al-manzil by Imam Al-Baghawy, among others, is that the da'wah method in QS An-nahl 125-128 is explained by using the wisdom method in a smart way according to the interpretation of the Quran, namely by using the matzoh Hashanah method in the form of an admonition, and then by using the yujadilu bill hiya ahsan method. That is to argue in a good way without being oppressive to those who disagree with the debate. Besides, it is also explained how to praise and honor the actions of others in a reasonable way without being exaggerated.
explanation: The text contains nonstandard transliterations and terms (e.g., 'ma'alim al-tanzil', 'matzoh Hashanah') and awkward, inconsistent phrasing, which are common in AI-generated or machine-translated text.
